title: The Unnamed Depth Registry

features.name: scale-marker
features.desc-on-touch: You read a measurement so fine it trembles against your eye. The archive has learned to count at depths where intimacy and measurement become the same act.

features.name: redressing station
features.desc-on-touch: Something here has been wrapped and wrapped again, layers of tape at a scale you can barely perceive. The bandages go down forever.

features.name: depth gauge
features.desc-on-touch: The needle oscillates between numbers that have no names yet. You feel this is how the archive counts things that do not wish to be counted.

features.name: unnamed catalog
features.desc-on-touch: Here the archive keeps records of things too small for titles. Each entry is a whisper at the threshold of audibility.

features.name: inverse measure
features.desc-on-touch: The closer you look, the more distance opens inside. You understand now why intimacy cannot speak itself aloud.

inscription: at this depth, the archive has learned that some truths live only at scales that refuse to speak themselves

file.name: Wound_Redressing_Intervals_Subatomic.log
file.note: checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable — a catalog of how many times a bandage must be replaced before the act of replacement becomes the wound itself

exits.label: toward fractals in the dressing material itself
where counts stop counting toward themselves
